DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Equitable tolling applies to make the filing of this case not time-barred. All three elements of the equitable tolling doctrine have been satisfied. In particular, plaintiffs' conduct in dismissing their federal claims in the federal case and filing this case is in "good faith" and is "reasonable" as those terms are used in the equitable tolling case law. Order signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
